steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content:
The “but” before the underlined sentence marks a contrast with MOMA's claim.

The author uses this sentence to establish that video games are inherently interactive, then points out that this feature is “grossly absent” in video presentations.

The author is building a factual basis to question MOMA's approach.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: It presents a consideration that the author thinks partly undermines MOMA's approach to exhibiting video games. correctly identifies this function, so D is correct.
